tasks.name: lsp-foundation-nav
tasks.scopedGoal: Advance the foundational LSP navigation issues #450, #334, #335 in the SELFHOST compiler (src/compiler/**). FIRST read `.orchestrate/lsp-cap-cli/bootstrap-context.md` — it maps the stale `crates/ark-*` references in the issue bodies to the real selfhost paths and warns you the `crates/` layout no longer exists. Read issues/open/450-lsp-goto-definition-identifier-span.md, 334-lsp-stdlib-definition-resolution.md, 335-lsp-cross-file-goto-definition.md and follow `.agents/impl-selfhost/SKILL.md` + `.agents/acceptance-slice-implementer/SKILL.md`. #450: add an identifier-only name span to `let`/fn/param in the parser AST (`src/compiler/parser/`, `parser.ark`) and make goto-definition (`src/compiler/lsp/feature_definition.ark`, `feature_symbol.ark`) return the identifier token span, not the whole declaration; handle innermost-shadowing. #334: load `std/manifest.toml` at LSP startup and make stdlib goto-definition return the `std/**/*.ark` implementation location, hover show signature+doc, and completion be manifest-driven (retire hardcoded arrays in completion.ark/feature_completion.ark). #335: switch goto-definition + goto-type-definition from single-file to the project-wide symbol index (`symbol_index*.ark`, #333 already landed) so cross-file, `use`-imported, and qualified `module::item` names resolve. Add/refresh selfhost LSP fixtures under tests/fixtures/selfhost/. Update each issue's `## Acceptance` checkboxes to reflect real verified state; move to issues/done/ only if fully met, then regenerate the issue index. Commit incrementally per issue so partial progress survives.
acceptance: #450: goto-definition range covers the identifier token only (let, param, fn name); innermost shadowing binding chosen
#334: stdlib goto-definition returns std/**/*.ark location; hover shows manifest signature+doc; completion is manifest-driven (no hardcoded arrays)
#335: cross-file, use-imported, and qualified module::item goto-definition + goto-type-definition resolve via the project-wide symbol index
New/updated selfhost LSP fixtures pass; python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0
Targeted issue files updated; index regenerated if any issue moved
tasks.verify:
## Setup
- Build the selfhost compiler the usual way (scripts/run/arukellt-selfhost.sh) and ensure std/manifest.toml is present.
## Automated
- Run `python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick` (must exit 0).
- Run the selfhost LSP fixture checks under tests/fixtures/selfhost/ (the LSP golden harness used by verify).
## Manual
- Exercise goto-definition on (a) a local `let`, (b) a stdlib function, (c) a symbol defined in another file via `use`, and confirm the returned range/URI.
## Gotchas
- The issue bodies reference deleted `crates/ark-*` files; the real code is src/compiler/**. Don't recreate crates/.

tasks.name: lsp-semantic-refs-hover
tasks.scopedGoal: Advance LSP semantic-references (#338) and semantic-only hover (#451) on top of the lsp-foundation-nav branch. FIRST read `.orchestrate/lsp-cap-cli/bootstrap-context.md` (stale crates/ paths -> selfhost src/compiler/** map). Read issues/open/338-lsp-semantic-references.md and 451-lsp-hover-semantic-only.md; follow `.agents/impl-selfhost/SKILL.md`. #338: replace text-based `references()` / `documentHighlight` (in `src/compiler/lsp/` dispatch/features + `src/compiler/analysis/symbols.ark`) with resolver symbol-id semantics so same-named-but-distinct symbols (shadowing, different scopes) are NOT conflated, and add project-wide cross-file references via the symbol index (#333). #451: make hover semantic-only — return no hover for literals, keywords, and identifiers with no semantic info (drop the `identifier \`x\``, `string literal`, `integer literal` noise) while keeping meaningful hover for stdlib/typed identifiers; respect the identifier end-boundary (`start <= off < end`). Add/refresh selfhost LSP fixtures. Update #338/#451 `## Acceptance` checkboxes to real verified state; move to done only if fully met; regenerate index if moved. Commit incrementally per issue.
acceptance: #338: references/documentHighlight use resolver symbol ids; shadowed / distinct-scope same-name symbols are not conflated; cross-file references work
#451: hover returns nothing for literals/keywords and semantic-less identifiers; stdlib/typed identifiers still hover; end-boundary not over-triggered
New/updated selfhost LSP fixtures pass; python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0
#338 and #451 issue files updated; index regenerated if moved

tasks.name: lsp-diagnostics-parity
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix LSP diagnostics false-positives (#452) on top of the lsp-semantic-refs-hover branch. FIRST read `.orchestrate/lsp-cap-cli/bootstrap-context.md`. Read issues/open/452-lsp-diagnostics-false-positives.md; follow `.agents/impl-selfhost/SKILL.md`. Root-cause the spurious E0100 unresolved-name diagnostics in the selfhost LSP path (`src/compiler/lsp/diagnostics.ark`, dispatch + analysis/resolver prelude binding) so LSP diagnostics match `arukellt check` for valid stdlib-prelude programs: ensure the LSP analysis path binds the stdlib prelude (same as the CLI check / driver Session path) and that the document analysis cache is invalidated on didChange/didSave. Add selfhost regression fixtures for valid-program-zero-diagnostics and stable-after-change. Then un-skip the E0100 E2E in `extensions/arukellt-all-in-one/src/test/extension.test.js` and make it pass (this is the only extension file you may touch). Update #452 `## Acceptance` to real verified state; move to done only if fully met; regenerate index if moved.
acceptance: #452: valid stdlib-prelude program produces zero LSP diagnostics, matching arukellt check (no spurious E0100)
#452: diagnostics update correctly after didChange/didSave (analysis cache invalidated); legitimate unresolved-name E0100 still reported
E0100 E2E in extensions/.../src/test/extension.test.js is un-skipped and passes
Selfhost regression fixtures added; python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0; #452 updated and index regenerated if moved
tasks.verify:
## Setup
- Start from the lsp-semantic-refs-hover branch; build selfhost compiler.
## Automated
- `python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick` (exit 0); selfhost diagnostics fixtures; the extension E0100 test (node test runner used by the extension).
## Manual
- Open a valid prelude-only .ark file in LSP and confirm zero diagnostics; compare with `arukellt check` on the same file.
## Gotchas
- Do NOT suppress legitimate unresolved-name errors; the goal is prelude binding + cache invalidation, suppression is last resort.

tasks.name: cli-extension-settings
tasks.scopedGoal: Land the CLI/LSP stdio startup contract (#236) and extension settings rationalization (#462) on top of the lsp-diagnostics-parity branch, then open ONE draft PR (base master) covering the whole editor/LSP cluster (#450/#334/#335/#338/#451/#452/#236/#462). FIRST read `.orchestrate/lsp-cap-cli/bootstrap-context.md` (note: #634 already wired `arukellt lsp` stdio; check current cmd_lsp before re-implementing). Read issues/open/236-cli-startup-contract-lsp-version-stdio.md and 462-extension-settings-rationalization.md; follow `.agents/impl-cli/SKILL.md` and `.agents/impl-vscode-ide/SKILL.md`. #236: confirm/implement+document that bare `arukellt lsp` speaks framed JSON-RPC on stdin/stdout with no script-file workaround, `arukellt --version` returns machine-readable semver, stdout=protocol-only & stderr=diagnostics/logs are cleanly separated, and the extension emits an actionable error when the CLI is missing (src/compiler/main/editor.ark, dispatch*.ark, args_*/usage/output; extensions/arukellt-all-in-one/src/extension.js). #462: add the 5+ settings to package.json (enableCodeLens, hoverDetailLevel, useSelfHostBackend, diagnostics.reportLevel, check.onSave), pass them through extension.js initializationOptions, parse them server-side in the selfhost LSP (init_workspace.ark / dispatch_lifecycle.ark) into a config struct + handle workspace/didChangeConfiguration, and wire behavior: enableCodeLens=false -> empty codeLens, hoverDetailLevel=minimal -> signature-only hover, diagnostics.reportLevel=errors -> warnings filtered out; add the settings table to README.md. Add LSP protocol/regression fixtures for the three behaviors. Update #236/#462 acceptance checkboxes to real state; move to done only if fully met; regenerate index if moved. As the terminal task in the editor chain, open the draft PR against master.
acceptance: #236: bare `arukellt lsp` stdio JSON-RPC documented + usable; `arukellt --version` machine-readable semver; stdout/stderr cleanly separated; extension gives actionable error when CLI missing

#462: 5 settings declared in package.json; passed via initializationOptions; parsed server-side + didChangeConfiguration handled; enableCodeLens/hoverDetailLevel/diagnostics.reportLevel behaviors take effect; README settings table present
LSP protocol/regression fixtures for the three #462 behaviors pass; python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0
#236 and #462 issue files updated; index/docs regenerated as needed; one draft PR against master opened covering the editor cluster

tasks.name: host-api-runtime-tests
tasks.scopedGoal: Advance #295 (host API runtime tests) including its real root cause. FIRST read `.orchestrate/lsp-cap-cli/bootstrap-context.md` — the #295 audit reopen says the selfhost wasm emitter has NO handlers for `__intrinsic_clock_now`, `__intrinsic_clock_now_ms`, `__intrinsic_random_i32` (same root cause as reopened #051), so the clock/random fixtures cannot lower today. Read issues/open/295-host-api-runtime-tests.md and issues/open/051-std-time-random.md; follow `.agents/impl-stdlib/SKILL.md` + `.agents/impl-selfhost/SKILL.md`. Implement the missing clock/random host intrinsic handlers in the selfhost wasm emitter (`src/compiler/wasm/call_host_io.ark` + its dispatch / `emitter.ark`) so the host surfaces lower and execute. Then ensure the runtime-test fixtures exist and are registered in tests/fixtures/manifest.txt and execute under the selfhost harness: clock monotonic (2 calls increase), random returns an in-range i32 (no nondeterminism dependence), fs read-of-missing-file error (existing fs_read_error.ark ok), env arg_count/args passing, and process::exit(0) clean exit. Close evidence must be emitter-backed execution, not fixture presence. Update #295 `## Acceptance` checkboxes (and #051 if its blocker clears) to real verified state; move to done only if fully met; regenerate index if moved. Open a draft PR against master.
acceptance: Selfhost wasm emitter has working handlers for __intrinsic_clock_now / __intrinsic_clock_now_ms / __intrinsic_random_i32 (clock+random surfaces lower and execute)
Fixtures pass under the selfhost harness: clock monotonic, random in-range i32, fs missing-file error, env arg_count/args, process::exit(0)
All five fixtures registered in tests/fixtures/manifest.txt and exercised by CI; python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick exits 0
#295 acceptance updated to real verified state; index regenerated if moved; draft PR against master opened
tasks.verify:
## Setup
- Build the selfhost compiler (scripts/run/arukellt-selfhost.sh).
## Automated
- `python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick` (exit 0); run the stdlib_io / stdlib_env / stdlib_time fixtures registered in tests/fixtures/manifest.txt under the selfhost harness.
## Manual
- Compile+run clock_random fixture and confirm clock is monotonic across 2 calls and random returns an i32 in range; run the process::exit(0) fixture and confirm exit code 0.
## Gotchas
- Do not make tests depend on specific random values; assert range/success only. Clock/random need the emitter intrinsic handlers FIRST (the #051 root cause).
